    \begin{enumerate}
        \item $x^{3}+4x^{2}-3x -18 = (x-2)(x+3)^2=0 \Leftrightarrow x = 2\text{~ou~} x= -3$
        \item $9x^2-6x+1 = (3x-1)^2 =0\Leftrightarrow x = \dfrac{1}{3}$
        \item $3x^3-27x = 3x(x-3)(x+3)=0 \Leftrightarrow x=0 \text{~ou~}x=3\text{~ou~}x=-3$
        \item $x^2+2x-8 = (x+4)(x-2) = 0\Leftrightarrow x=-4 \text{~ou~}x=2$
    \end{enumerate}
